blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 13.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 10" over the past week. Current depth: 47".
